query: ขอข้อมูลเกี่ยวกับการแสดงบุนรากุที่โอซาก้า
reasoning: Tool called get_traditional_arts with lang=th but no keyword filter for 文楽/bunraku and no prefecture/location filter for Osaka. The 183-record unfiltered response surfaces mountain shamanic and kagura content — no Bunraku content is visible. Rule B: single root cause is retrieval failure (no keyword arg passed); intent and specificity both suffer but specificity is worst-hit (score 1). Language constraint (th) was respected so constraint_handling is only docked for the missed Osaka location constraint.
missing_data: Bunraku-specific records (文楽, 人形浄瑠璃, 国立文楽劇場 Osaka venue, UNESCO ICH inscription Q193464, performance schedule). A call like get_traditional_arts({"keyword": "文楽", "lang": "th"}) or search_area({"q": "文楽", "prefecture": "Osaka"}) would surface the correct content.
improvement_hint: When intent classifier detects a named art form (文楽, bunraku, 人形浄瑠璃) inside a get_traditional_arts call, auto-inject keyword=<art_form> to filter the 183-record corpus. Also propagate toponym constraint (Osaka) into prefecture filter or cross-link to 国立文楽劇場 canonical entity.
